stories.title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
stories.summary: Analysis of how GLM 5.2's release signals a broader collapse in AI margins as open-source models close the gap with proprietary offerings, threatening the business models of major AI companies.

stories.title: A global workspace in language models
stories.summary: Anthropic publishes new research proposing a global workspace architecture for language models, drawing inspiration from cognitive science theories of consciousness to improve multi-step reasoning.

stories.title: AMD Ryzen AI Halo – $4k AI Dev Kit
stories.summary: AMD launches the Ryzen AI Halo, a $4,000 developer kit aimed at local AI inference and model development, signaling a push to make dedicated AI hardware more accessible to indie developers.

stories.title: China's AI companion rules: what Beijing is really going after
stories.summary: China introduces new regulations targeting AI companion apps, focusing on emotional manipulation, data privacy, and the psychological impact of AI relationships on vulnerable users.

stories.title: The 'first' AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
stories.summary: Security researchers document what's being called the first AI-orchestrated ransomware attack, though analysis reveals human operators were still required at critical decision points.

stories.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
stories.summary: Microsoft cuts nearly 5,000 jobs in its latest round of layoffs, with AI-driven automation cited as a key factor as the company restructures toward AI-first operations.

stories.title: Takeda signs $600M AI drug discovery deal with Insilico
stories.summary: Pharmaceutical giant Takeda signs a landmark $600 million partnership with AI drug discovery firm Insilico Medicine to accelerate novel therapeutic development using generative AI.

stories.title: Ternlight – 7 MB embedding model that runs in browser (WASM)
stories.summary: Ternlight is a tiny 7MB embedding model that runs entirely in the browser via WebAssembly, enabling semantic search and NLP tasks without any server or API dependency.

stories.title: Anthropic deploys Claude Sonnet 5, Fable and Mythos restored
stories.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 and restores access to its Fable and Mythos frontier models following a federal export control review, expanding its enterprise AI offerings.

stories.title: OfficeCLI: Office suite for AI agents to read and edit Microsoft Office files
stories.summary: OfficeCLI is an open-source command-line tool that enables AI agents to programmatically read, edit, and generate Microsoft Office documents, bridging the gap between AI automation and legacy office formats.
